comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-005 (high, tdd -- risk-gate-matrix.md:26 requires tdd at high/critical). Populated after the quality gate reran tests/agent-model-routing.tests.sh AND its new tests/agent-model-routing.tests.ps1 twin back-to-back (full REQ-002/REQ-005 case list, both twins green; specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/qg/T-005/focused-tests.log), the epic-159-pillar-c cross-suite regression set (all six T-001..T-006 suites, both lanes, 0 failed; specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/qg/T-005/regression.log), and check-traceability.sh against specs/epic-159-pillar-c/traceability.json (9 REQ links, all with acs/tests present and existing evidence files; specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/qg/T-005/traceability.log) to satisfy the high-risk requirement-traceability check. Shell stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build) for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files. TDD red evidence is two-part per the task's own RED definition -- specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/T-005/red-twin-absent.log (the pre-landing absence of the .ps1 twin itself) and red-mutated-golden.log (the extended .sh cases against a deliberately mutated golden fixture); green evidence is specs/epic-159-pillar-c/verification/T-005/green-sh.log with green-ps1.log as the cross-runtime pair. Per the implementation report (reports/implementation/epic-159-pillar-c/T-005.md): most of the TEST-027..034 case list was already present pre-T-005 (REQ-005/acceptance-tests.md frame most of it as mirroring T-002's Phase-1 smoke); this task's own new work is the full .ps1 twin port (~450 new PowerShell lines), the two genuinely new cases (TEST-027, TEST-034), and closing the test.yml registration gap -- cross-checked against design.md Test Strategy note 7. The human-copy application step for this task's staged test.yml candidate (sitting alongside T-003's four still-pending reviewer-file candidates in the same manifest) has not occurred as of this report -- expected, documented, not an implementation gap.

checks.waiver_reason: No lint tool configured for this repository's shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files (stack: shell); bash -n and pwsh parse validity are exercised implicitly by every green run recorded in focused-tests.log.
No static type-check command is configured for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files.

No network or service integration is in scope beyond what unit/acceptance already exercise against the real, fixture-copied or fixture-driven scripts this task edits; no separate service-integration surface exists.
No compile/build toolchain for shell/PowerShell test-infrastructure files.
No independently startable application/UI/service; this task's suite fully covers its own CLI/script surface via the focused and regression logs.

No baseline-behavior.md exists for this feature; this is not a refactor/bugfix task (differential-test-policy.md does not apply). The change is additive per design.md's API/Contract Plan; the saved red/green evidence and cross-suite regression set provide the applicable behavior comparison.
No user-facing UI surface; this task's Planned Files are contract/script/test/doc files only.
ds_profile: none; no design-system/ directory exists in this repository.
